pre_existing_disease_waiting_months._reconciliation: Bug #44: garbled source line — 'Pre-existing diseases waiting period: 12 months 36 months (plan A) & 24 Months (plan B) – for below procedure 1. Joint replacement surgery'. The GENERAL PED waiting period is 12 months; the 36/24 figures are PROCEDURE-specific (joint replacement) plan-A/plan-B sub-waits, NOT the general PED. Value 12 confirmed (already agreed base==__cis); quote/note disambiguated.
